name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Black Silver High Quality✨True high quality, classic hit💓Sac de Jour - Front flap wallet, comes with detachable metal chain, metal interlocking Y logo, jacquard embossed stitching. Size 22.5*14*4CM, Model: 01740🔺100% Calfskin! Front snap closure! 16 card slots, 1 coin pocket, 2 bill compartments💋💋
